cardDesc: Experience the perfect blend of intelligence and affection with our upcoming F1B Bernedoodle litter. These medium-sized companions are expected to mature between 40–50 lbs, offering a low-to-non-shedding coat ideal for families seeking a manageable, loyal addition to their home. Raised with the dedicated care and "boutique" standards of Yarnelle Fur-Babies, these puppies will be ready to join their new families soon.
description: Our upcoming litter of Medium F1B Bernedoodles, expected to arrive in May 2026, represents a premier pairing designed for families seeking the perfect "boutique" companion. This litter is the result of a thoughtful match between Meadow, our affectionate Mini F1 Bernedoodle, and Bonsai, a handsome Standard AKC Poodle known for his intelligence and athletic elegance. By breeding a Bernedoodle back to a Poodle, these F1B puppies offer the highest likelihood of a low-to-non-shedding, hypoallergenic coat, making them an excellent choice for households with allergy concerns. We anticipate these puppies will mature into medium-sized adults with an estimated weight range of 40–50 lbs. Every puppy in this Meadow and Bonsai litter is raised with the dedicated, hands-on care of Luke and Eli Yarnelle to ensure they are well-socialized, loyal, and ready to become a cherished member of your family.
damDesc: Meadow is a sweet and affectionate Mini F1 Bernedoodle who serves as the wonderful mother to this upcoming litter. Known for her lovely temperament and beautiful coat, she brings a gentle, family-oriented nature to her puppies. As an F1 Bernedoodle, she provides the perfect foundation for these F1B offspring, ensuring they inherit the best qualities of the Bernese Mountain Dog lineage.
sireDesc: Bonsai is a handsome, Standard AKC Poodle who brings athletic elegance and a sharp, highly intelligent mind to the pairing. As the father, his AKC pedigree and Poodle genetics are key to producing puppies with the low-to-non-shedding, hypoallergenic coats that families often look for. His contribution ensures that the litter will mature into smart, trainable, and medium-sized companions.
